title: meriandra abyssinica
intro: Meriandra abyssinica, also known as Abyssinian meriandra, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae, native to East Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Meriandra abyssinica include treating fever, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as serving as an antiseptic and antispasmodic agent. Herbal preparations of Meriandra abyssinica are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
